input:
Title: Implement cursor-based pagination for /entities endpoint
Author: Mei Chen
Assignee: Mei Chen
Labels: enhancement, api
Milestone: Sprint 4

Body:
Currently the /entities endpoint uses offset pagination which doesn't scale. We need to switch to cursor-based pagination.

Acceptance criteria:
- Add `cursor` query parameter
- Response includes `next_cursor` field
- Max page size capped at 200
- Existing integration tests updated

Blocking: PR #312 (schema migration) must merge first.
